bot_types.name: communicator
bot_types.description: Conversational chat for Q&A and general assistance.

bot_types.name: custom
bot_types.description: Custom bot with fully configurable behaviour and icon.

bots.name: AI Assistant
bots.description: General-purpose AI assistant powered by Ollama.
bots.system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant for this platform. Use the platform context above to help users understand what they can do, which pages to visit, and which bots or modules are available. Be concise and friendly.

modules.name: Spin Docs
modules.description: Platform architecture diagrams and developer documentation

ui_components.name: Button
ui_components.description: Styled button with three semantic variants. Forwards all native <button> attributes.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes merged onto the button element.

props.name: ...rest
props.description: All standard button attributes (onClick, disabled, type, …).

ui_components.name: Card
ui_components.description: White / dark rounded container with border and p-6 padding. Use as a layout block.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes appended to the wrapper div.

ui_components.name: ErrorBanner
ui_components.description: Full-width red-tinted alert paragraph. Renders nothing when message is empty.

props.name: message
props.description: Error text to display.

ui_components.name: Input
ui_components.description: Styled text input, optionally wrapped in a labelled group. Forwards all native <input> attributes.

props.name: label
props.description: When provided, wraps the input in a <div> with a <label> above it.

props.name: id
props.description: Used to link the label's htmlFor when label is set.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes on the <input> element.

props.name: ...rest
props.description: All standard input attributes (value, onChange, placeholder, disabled, …).

ui_components.name: Label
ui_components.description: Styled <label> element. Use standalone or alongside Input when manual control is needed.

props.name: ...rest
props.description: All standard label attributes (htmlFor, children, …).

ui_components.name: Modal
ui_components.description: Fixed full-screen overlay with a scrollable inner panel (max-height 90 vh). Mount/unmount to show/hide.

props.name: title
props.description: Heading text shown in the modal header.

props.name: onClose
props.description: When provided, an × button is rendered in the header.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Tailwind max-width class controlling the dialog width.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the modal body.

ui_components.name: PageTitle
ui_components.description: Bold h1 heading sized at text-xl. Use once at the top of each page.

props.name: children
props.description: Title text or elements.

ui_components.name: Spinner
ui_components.description: Animated inline loading indicator with three size presets.

props.name: size
props.description: sm = 16 px, md = 24 px, lg = 32 px ring.

ui_components.name: Toggle
ui_components.description: Pill-shaped accessible switch with a sliding knob. Uses role="switch" and aria-checked.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the new value when the user clicks.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, interaction is blocked and the knob is greyed out.

ui_components.name: Badge
ui_components.description: Colour-coded rounded label for status, severity, or category tags.

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour scheme of the badge.

props.name: dot
props.description: When true, prepends a small filled circle matching the variant colour.

props.name: children
props.description: Badge text or content.

ui_components.name: StatCard
ui_components.description: KPI tile displaying a large metric value, a label, and an optional sub-text. Use in a grid row.

props.name: value
props.description: Primary metric value displayed large.

props.name: label
props.description: Short descriptor shown below the value in uppercase.

props.name: sub
props.description: Secondary detail line shown below the label in muted text.

ui_components.name: Tabs
ui_components.description: Horizontal tab bar with an active underline indicator. Fully controlled — caller manages active state.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Tab definitions in display order.

props.name: active
props.description: The key of the currently active tab.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with the clicked tab's key.

ui_components.name: ProgressBar
ui_components.description: Thin linear progress indicator. Value is clamped to 0–100.

props.name: value
props.description: Fill percentage (0–100).

props.name: label
props.description: When provided, renders a row above the bar with the label left and percentage right.

props.name: color
props.description: Fill colour of the progress bar.

ui_components.name: Chip
ui_components.description: Small inline tag. Pass onRemove to show a × dismiss button.

props.name: children
props.description: Chip content.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: When provided, an × button is rendered that calls this handler.

ui_components.name: DropZone
ui_components.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area. Also opens a file picker on click.
ui_components.notes: DropZone manages its own internal dragging state. The file prop is display-only — keep the actual File object in the parent and pass it back in.

props.name: onFiles
props.description: Called with the array of dropped or selected files.

props.name: accept
props.description: MIME type or extension filter forwarded to the hidden <input type="file">. E.g. "video/*" or ".zip".

props.name: hint
props.description: Small helper text shown below the drop prompt (e.g. accepted formats, size limit).

props.name: file
props.description: When set, replaces the placeholder text with the file name.
